channel.title: Seattle Mariners on Emerald City Gear
channel.description: Recent content in Seattle Mariners on Emerald City Gear

item.title: Back Home and Hungry: Mariners Host Astros in Must-Watch 4-Game Series
item.description: The Mariners return to T-Mobile Park for a crucial 4-game home stand against the Houston Astros, April 10–13. Here's what to watch — and how to be there.

item.title: Colt Emerson Just Signed the Most Historic Deal in Mariners History — and He Hasn't Even Debuted Yet
item.description: The Mariners locked up top prospect Colt Emerson to an 8-year, $95 million deal before his MLB debut — the largest pre-debut contract in baseball history. Here's what it means for Seattle's future.
